description: Online marketplace for electronics, home goods, and clothing with same-day delivery.

intents.name: search_products
intents.description: Search the product catalog by keyword, category, or brand. Returns product name, price, rating, stock status, and estimated delivery date. Supports filtering by price range and minimum rating.

intents.name: get_product_details
intents.description: Get full details for a specific product including description, specifications, customer reviews, pricing history, and related products.

intents.name: add_to_cart
intents.description: Add a product to the user's shopping cart. Returns updated cart contents and total.

intents.name: complete_purchase
intents.description: Finalize the purchase of all items in the cart. Returns order confirmation number and estimated delivery date.
